turns.speaker: learner
turns.text: Reporting an issue at a rental property 🗨️ “Hi, I'd like to report a damage at my rental property.”

turns.speaker: bot
turns.text: Of course. Could you please tell me what kind of damage you’re reporting?

turns.speaker: learner
turns.text: “So, how is doing?”

turns.speaker: bot
turns.text: I’m doing well, thank you! How about you? Let me know the details of the damage, and I’ll help you out.

turns.speaker: learner
turns.text: “Yes, please, I would like to report a damage at my rental property.”

turns.speaker: bot
turns.text: Absolutely, I’m here to help. Could you let me know what specific damage you’ve noticed, and which part of the property it’s in?

turns.speaker: learner
turns.text: “Yes, my shower is coming out as ice cold..”

turns.speaker: bot
turns.text: Oh, I see! So the shower water is only coming out as ice-cold? That definitely sounds uncomfortable. Could you let me know if this issue started suddenly or if it’s been ongoing for a while?

turns.speaker: learner
turns.text: “Okay, the problem started on Friday.”

turns.speaker: bot
turns.text: Got it, thanks for sharing that. And just to confirm, have you tried adjusting the temperature settings or is it consistently cold no matter what?

turns.speaker: learner
turns.text: “Oh, I don't know the number, but it's very cold.”

turns.speaker: bot
turns.text: I understand, that must be frustrating. All right, could you let me know if there’s any other issue, like with the water pressure or maybe any visible leaks?

turns.speaker: learner
turns.text: “Oh, I'm sorry, I don't understand, can you repeat, please?”

turns.speaker: bot
turns.text: Of course, no problem! I was just asking if you’ve noticed any other issues, like low water pressure or any leaks around the shower area.

turns.speaker: learner
turns.text: Transcrição indisponível

turns.speaker: bot
turns.text: I see, so there might be some leaks as well. Thanks for letting me know. Could you also tell me if you’ve already informed your landlord or property manager about this issue?

turns.speaker: learner
turns.text: Transcrição indisponível

turns.speaker: bot
turns.text: Got it, thanks for sharing that. In that case, would you like some guidance on how to report it formally, or is there any additional detail you think I should know?

turns.speaker: learner
turns.text: “Okay, thanks for now...”

turns.speaker: bot
turns.text: No worries at all!

turns.speaker: learner
turns.text: Transcrição indisponível

turns.speaker: bot
turns.text: Absolutely, that makes sense. We'll definitely make sure to get that sorted out. Is there anything else you’d like to add or any other concerns you have about the property?

turns.speaker: learner
turns.text: “Ah, okay. Perfect.”

turns.speaker: bot
turns.text: Great! If you need anything else or have any more questions, just let me know. I’m here to help!

turns.speaker: learner
turns.text: “Perfect, thank you. For now, that's it. So, thank you.”

turns.speaker: bot
turns.text: You’re very welcome! Glad I could help. If you need anything else in the future, just reach out. Have a wonderful day!

turns.speaker: learner
turns.text: “Have a good day, bye!”

turns.speaker: bot
turns.text: You too! Take care and see you next time. Bye for now!
